scenes.title: The Toy Box
scenes.background_prompt: A child's playroom with a large open wooden toy box, a colorful rug, building blocks scattered around, and a window with curtains. No people, no toys in the box.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A child's playroom with warm light coming through a window with yellow curtains. A large open wooden toy box sits in the center of a colorful striped rug. Inside and around the box: a soft brown teddy bear with a stitched smile sits propped against the inside wall, a rag doll with yarn hair and a patched dress lies draped over the edge, and a tower of stacked wooden blocks in red, blue, and yellow stands on the rug beside the box. Oddly, a single adult leather shoe — brown, scuffed, clearly not a toy — sits inside the toy box among the toys, looking entirely out of place. Crayons and a coloring book are scattered on the floor nearby.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place teddy inside the toy box, propped against the inside wall. Place doll draped over the edge of the toy box. Place block tower on the rug beside the box, stacked. Place shoe inside the toy box among the toys, clearly out of place.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground on the left, a cluster of blocks sits on a green patterned rug with yellow and blue swirling designs; this group includes a red cube, a yellow cube, a blue cube, a green cube, another red cube, and a tan triangular prism. To the right of these, a single shoe, which is a green and brown sneaker with yellow laces and a white sole, rests on the rug. In the center foreground, a tall stack of blocks consists of a large green cube at the base, followed by a yellow rectangular prism, a blue cylinder, a tan triangular prism, and a small yellow cube at the top. To the right of this stack is a small structure made of a blue rectangular block base, a tan cylinder, and a red triangular block roof. Further right, another structure features a tan arch-shaped block base supporting a green rectangular block and a tan rectangular block, topped with a blue triangular block roof. A single red cube block sits on the far right edge of the rug. The rug itself lies on a light-colored wooden floor. In the middle ground on the left, a large wooden toy chest with visible dovetail joints stands with its lid open. A doll with brown yarn hair, wearing a green dress with yellow patches and small brown shoes, stands upright against the left side of the chest. Inside the open chest, a brown teddy with a light-colored snout and ears sits facing right, alongside other partially visible toys. Above the toy chest, a wooden shelf is mounted on the light pink wall, holding a yellow picture frame, a round pink object, and a green vase. To the right of the toy chest, a large window is framed by light-colored curtains with orange polka dots, tied back with matching fabric. Through the window, a sunny outdoor landscape is visible, featuring rolling green hills, several green and orange trees, and a blue sky with fluffy white clouds under a bright sun.

CH: brown teddy bear sitting in the chest
doll with brown yarn hair and dress
S: sunny day in a child's bedroom
rolling green hills outside the window
green patterned rug on wooden floor
IE: the toy chest was left wide open
blocks were taken out to build towers
IR: the doll looks happy and ready to play
the teddy bear feels safe in the chest
P: someone wanted to build a tall tower
the toys want to stay out and play
A: the doll stands against the wooden chest
the teddy bear sits among the toys
CO: colorful blocks are scattered on the rug
a single shoe sits alone on the floor

ENP: large wooden toy chest with open lid
green and brown sneaker with yellow laces
tall stack of colorful wooden blocks
green patterned rug with yellow swirls
